info.title: Vecerdi.License
info.description: Generate license files for your projects

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates a license file based on the given SPDX identifier.

commands.name: print
commands.description: Print the source of a given SPDX license identifier

arguments.name: spdx-identifier
arguments.description: The SPDX identifier of the license to print.
